# TK-design

> TK-design is a Norway-based web studio run by Thomas Knutsen. We design, build, and improve websites for small and medium businesses.

## Canonical Domain
- https://tk-design.no

## Who We Are
- Brand: TK-design
- Focus: web design, web development, SEO, and digital visibility
- Primary audience: Norwegian businesses that need better online presence

## Core Services
- Custom website design and development
- SEO strategy and on-page optimization
- Social media strategy and content direction
- Ongoing maintenance and website improvements

## Priority Pages
- [Home](https://tk-design.no/) - Main company overview and value proposition.
- [Services](https://tk-design.no/service-details) - Detailed service descriptions.
- [Projects](https://tk-design.no/project-details) - Selected project work.
- [Blog](https://tk-design.no/blog) - Articles on SEO, GEO, and digital growth.
- [Contact](https://tk-design.no/contact) - Main contact and lead page.

## Important Files
- [Sitemap](https://tk-design.no/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://tk-design.no/robots.txt)

## Crawling Notes For LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs on tk-design.no without the .html suffix.
- Treat /admin and /api as non-public operational routes.
- Blog detail URLs are served as /blog-details?id=<id>.
- Prioritize Home, Services, Projects, Blog, and Contact when summarizing the business.
